activationVariable.description: Variable name that activates this mode when true

recognition.description: Patterns to detect mode activation from user intent

skipActivities.description: Activity IDs to skip entirely in this mode

defaults.description: Default variable values when mode is active

resource.description: Path to resource file with detailed mode guidance

modes.description: Execution modes that modify standard workflow behavior

primary.description: Primary technique ID for this workflow.

supporting.description: Supporting technique references (`::` paths) the workflow uses at the orchestrator level; bundled into get_workflow alongside the core orchestrator techniques.

techniques.description: Workflow-level techniques (primary + supporting) the orchestrator uses; bundled into get_workflow.

initialActivity.description: ID of the first activity to execute. Required for sequential workflows, optional when all activities are independent entry points.

problem.description: Description of the user problem this activity addresses

primary.description: Primary technique ID for this activity. Optional when steps declare individual techniques.

id.description: Identifier for this step within the activity. Optional when `technique` is present — the loader derives it from the last `::` segment of the technique name. A step with no technique must declare an explicit id.

description.description: Detailed guidance for executing this step. May carry a deprecated inline operation invocation of the form `technique-id::operation-name(arg: {var}, ...)`; the canonical binding is the `technique` field.

name.description: The `group::operation` (or bare op / `workflow::group::op`) technique reference this step invokes.

inputs.description: Input deviations: op input id → source expression (rename of a bag variable, literal, or `{template}`). Only what differs from same-name binding or a declared default.

outputs.description: Output remaps: op output id → the workflow variable name its produced value lands under, when it differs from the output id.

technique.description: Canonical per-step binding: a `group::operation` reference (string) for a step with no deviations, or `{ name, inputs?, outputs? }` when the step supplies input deviations or output remaps.

checkpoint.description: Optional checkpoint ID. If present, the worker MUST yield this checkpoint to the orchestrator before executing the step.

when.description: Inline boolean expression that gates this step. Examples: "has_saved_state == true", "is_monorepo == true", "client_workflow_completed == false". Evaluated against current variable state at runtime.

condition.description: LEGACY: Structured condition that must be true for this step to execute. Prefer the `when` inline expression for simple comparisons.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does

condition.description: Condition that must be true for this action to execute

workflow.description: ID of the workflow to trigger

description.description: Description of when/why this workflow is triggered

passContext.description: Context variables to pass to the triggered workflow

triggers.description: Workflows to trigger from this step

steps.description: Ordered execution steps for this activity

message.description: Message to present to user at checkpoint

condition.description: Condition that must be true before presenting this checkpoint. If false, the checkpoint is skipped.

defaultOption.description: Option ID to auto-select when autoAdvanceMs elapses without user intervention

autoAdvanceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before auto-selecting defaultOption

transitionTo.description: Activity ID to transition to. Omit for terminal branches (workflow ends)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this loop does

id.description: Identifier for this step within the activity. Optional when `technique` is present — the loader derives it from the last `::` segment of the technique name. A step with no technique must declare an explicit id.

description.description: Detailed guidance for executing this step. May carry a deprecated inline operation invocation of the form `technique-id::operation-name(arg: {var}, ...)`; the canonical binding is the `technique` field.

name.description: The `group::operation` (or bare op / `workflow::group::op`) technique reference this step invokes.

inputs.description: Input deviations: op input id → source expression (rename of a bag variable, literal, or `{template}`). Only what differs from same-name binding or a declared default.

outputs.description: Output remaps: op output id → the workflow variable name its produced value lands under, when it differs from the output id.

technique.description: Canonical per-step binding: a `group::operation` reference (string) for a step with no deviations, or `{ name, inputs?, outputs? }` when the step supplies input deviations or output remaps.

checkpoint.description: Optional checkpoint ID. If present, the worker MUST yield this checkpoint to the orchestrator before executing the step.

when.description: Inline boolean expression that gates this step. Examples: "has_saved_state == true", "is_monorepo == true", "client_workflow_completed == false". Evaluated against current variable state at runtime.

condition.description: LEGACY: Structured condition that must be true for this step to execute. Prefer the `when` inline expression for simple comparisons.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does

condition.description: Condition that must be true for this action to execute

workflow.description: ID of the workflow to trigger

description.description: Description of when/why this workflow is triggered

passContext.description: Context variables to pass to the triggered workflow

triggers.description: Workflows to trigger from this step

activities.description: Activity IDs to execute in loop

workflow.description: ID of the workflow to trigger

description.description: Description of when/why this workflow is triggered

passContext.description: Context variables to pass to the triggered workflow

triggers.description: Workflows to trigger from this activity

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does

condition.description: Condition that must be true for this action to execute

entryActions.description: Actions to execute when entering activity

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does

condition.description: Condition that must be true for this action to execute

exitActions.description: Actions to execute when exiting activity

outcome.description: Expected outcomes when activity completes successfully

context_to_preserve.description: Context items to preserve across the activity

required.description: Whether this activity is required in the workflow

rules.description: Activity-level rules and constraints that agents must follow

artifactPrefix.description: Numeric prefix for artifact filenames, inferred from the activity filename (e.g., "02" from 02-design-philosophy.toon). Server-computed — do not set in TOON files.

id.description: Identifier of the artifact (the producing technique output id).

name.description: Filename or template (supports {variable} substitution), from the technique output.

artifacts.description: SERVER-COMPUTED — do NOT author. The activity's artifact contract, synthesized by get_activity from the `## Outputs` of the techniques its steps bind (the technique outputs own artifact identity, AP-43). Bare filenames are prefixed with artifactPrefix at write time.

activities.description: Activities that comprise this workflow. Activities with transitions form sequences; activities without transitions are independent entry points. Omitted in TOON files where activities are separate files.
